description: Remote learning facility with offline curriculum delivery and student progress tracking.
challenge: Schools in rural or disaster-prone areas face periodic connectivity outages, disrupting remote learning and losing student progress data.
response: VITO caches curriculum locally, logs student progress independently of network state, and resumes synchronization when connectivity returns. Teachers can continue lessons without interruption.
result: Uninterrupted education, preserved learning records, and offline UX that feels native to students.
